CustomField.description: Adds FK traceability from a result back to the source question bank. This field fixes that. Enables Penny to retrieve the correct answer explanation when coaching an incorrect response.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Adds FK traceability from a result back to the source question bank. This field fixes that. Enables Penny to retrieve the correct answer explanation when coaching an incorrect response.
CustomField.label: Skill Question
